column1: # Purpose: Source-of-truth capability matrix for shared/client/CLI/TUI exposure.
# Responsibilities: Declare which features are exposed by the client, CLI, and TUI along with any intentional asymmetry.
# Scope: Used by docs and architecture tests to keep parity decisions explicit.
# Usage: Update this file first, then regenerate docs/capability-matrix.md to match.

column5: Shared search workflows power both frontends.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose management flows.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose index operations.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose user management.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose role management.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose app management.
Shared client surface; both frontends expose KVStore status and collection flows.
Shared cluster management APIs are exposed in both frontends.
Shared diagnostics workflow backs CLI doctor and TUI connection diagnostics.
Shared multi-profile workflow backs CLI list-all and TUI multi-instance.
Shared export workflow owns JSON/CSV/NDJSON/YAML/Markdown serialization.
Undo/redo is a TUI interaction feature.
Support-bundle generation remains a CLI workflow.
CLI shell completion and manpage generation remain CLI-only deliverables.
TUI does not expose HEC ingest flows by product choice.
